title: Germán A. Tessmer — Economist
text:
Germán A. Tessmer
I am an economist at Universidad Nacional de Rosario (UNR), where I direct the Observatorio Económico Social and teach Econometrics. My work is grounded in labor economics — informality, wage premia, and employment dynamics in Argentina — and carried out with the methods that now define rigorous applied research: causal inference, machine learning for variable selection, and AI-assisted empirical workflows.
C.V.  ·  Research
email: ger.tessmer@gmail.com  ·  german.tessmer@unr.edu.ar

title: About
text:
About this site

1 + 1

[1] 2

title: EPH Ecosystem — Germán A. Tessmer
text: Since 2015 I have worked continuously with Argentina’s Encuesta Permanente de Hogares (EPH), the country’s main household survey. What began as applied reports at the Observatorio Económico Social UNR evolved into a full open-data infrastructure — a harmonized dataset, reference documentation, and a research agenda on survey redesigns. Materials are ordered by hierarchy and recency: the most recent work supersedes the earliest reports, which are kept as part of the record.

title: EPH Ecosystem — Germán A. Tessmer
text:
Research

From Breaks to Bridges: An Architecture for Survey Redesigns That Expand Conceptual Scope (with Bárbara Boggiano) → SSRN → bridge_eph.R Companion script: rebuilds the aggregate variables removed from the raw INDEC user databases by the Q4-2024 redesign, applying the paper’s deterministic bridge rules (base R only).

title: EPH Ecosystem — Germán A. Tessmer
text:
Data & Documentation

EPH – Observatorio. Encuesta Permanente de Hogares de Argentina. Explicada, etiquetada y ampliada (with Santiago Moleres & Laureano E. Hess) Universidad Nacional de Rosario, 2024. → Dataset → separa_eph.R Companion script: splits each person-level dataset back into its household and individual bases, preserving types, factors, and labels (base R only).
Manual Metodológico EPH – Observatorio Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2026. Methodological companion to the dataset: documents the Q4-2024 questionnaire redesign, constructed variables, and the methodological breaks relevant for longitudinal analysis. → Repository
Diccionario EPH – Observatorio Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2026. Reference documentation for the processed EPH databases. → Repository
Manual EPH – Observatorio (with Luciano Jara Musuruana & Patricio Almeida Gentile) Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2020. First-generation manual for the EPH databases compiled and extended by the Observatorio, superseded by the 2026 documentation. → Repository

title: Research — Germán A. Tessmer
text:
Reports & Outreach
Director and co-author of over 60 research and outreach reports published between 2015 and 2024 through the Observatorio Económico Social UNR (ISSN 2683-9067), covering labor markets, monetary policy, housing, energy, and regional economics. All reports are available through the UNR institutional repository.
Selected reports:

Nueva ley de alquileres: contexto general y situación de los estudiantes de UNR (with Diego Marfetán Molina, Luciano Jara Musuruana, Alfredo Bula, Lucia Papa & Patricio Almeida Gentile) Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2021. → Repository
Pre-Covid: Indicadores socio-económicos para AGR y Argentina (with Luciano Jara Musuruana, Diego Marfetán Molina, Lucia Papa & Patricio Almeida Gentile) Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2020. → Repository
La educación en Santa Fe y Rosario: resultados Aprender 2016 (with Patricio Almeida Gentile) Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2017. → Repository
